svg.aria-label: Chunking families as cards: seven families, each with a mini visual of where it cuts and its list of strategies, plus a how-to-choose tip card.
svg.text: each family is defined by what decides the boundary
A counting rule: characters, tokens, sentences, pages.
The document's own markup: headings, code, tables.
Where meaning shifts — typically via embeddings.
Several sizes at once: small to find, large to read.
An LLM reads the text and picks the breakpoints.
At embed or retrieve time — not a way of splitting.
applied on top of any family
Nothing is split — it tags chunks to improve recall.
Match the cutter to the document's own structure.
Start with fixed or recursive; reach for a heavier
family only when retrieval metrics justify the cost.
overlap — repeats text, covers the seam
clean boundary — lands on a real seam
